description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every push to any branch except tags and on pull requests. The workflow should have three jobs: check-javascript, pylint, and test. The check-javascript job should run on ubuntu-latest, check out the repository, set up Node.js 16.17.0, install dependencies, lint JavaScript, and build the JavaScript bundle. The pylint job should set up Python 3.11, install dependencies, and run pylint on the web_pdb module. The test job should use a matrix strategy to test with different Python versions, set up Python, install dependencies, test with tox, and upload screenshots as artifacts.
